rows.label: tlk47200161_03_msg0001
rows.name:
Children who went to Acedia's school
seem back in the village.

rows.label: tlk47200161_03_msg0002
rows.name:
They finally got out of the village.
What a waste. What happened?

rows.label: tlk47200161_03_msg0003
rows.name:
The adults seem to know something,
but nobody will tell me.

rows.label: tlk47100161_01_msg0004
rows.name:
If those children don't return
to Acedia, maybe I'll go instead—
just kidding.
